info.title: Checklist Public API
info.description: Public API contract for Checklist App, defining the planned external REST API surface for checklist, task, attachment, tag, calendar, user, instance, and recurring checklist operations.

get.description: Public API concept mapped from the existing internal API.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Existing internal identifier used by the mapped API.

parameters.name: mail
parameters.description: User email used for member visibility filtering.

parameters.name: is_owner
parameters.description: Set to 1 when the caller should be treated as an owner.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search text.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter value.

parameters.name: tagFilter
parameters.description: Tag filter value. Multiple values may use the existing delimiter supported by the API.

parameters.description: Sort field.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort order.
